repo_prior_art.cite: doc/API.md §1 covers Q1 panel residualized-score geometry only; pid_network_exposure_v1 covers finite shared-completion ADE bounds, not ANI/NCR/RT covariance collapse

published_prior_art.cite: Leung2022ANI proves ANI IPW consistency with network HAC; Leung2023NCRI and BasseDingFellerToulis2024 supply adjacent inference objects, but not the explicit oracle three-map collapse

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure_v1: sharp finite shared-completion/cellwise-relaxation gap, not an asymptotic observable compatibility operator across ANI, NCR, and RT functionals

published_prior_art.cite: Leung2022ANI, Leung2023NCRI, BasseDingFellerToulis2024, GaoDing2025Network, PuelzBasseFellerToulis2022, WeinsteinNevo2026 each treat one procedure family or misspecification axis, not an iff Delta_eta frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: pid_network_exposure_v1 gives finite partial-identification strictness, not an open-class asymptotic separation among exposure point scores, covariance operators, and design-orbit randomization

published_prior_art.cite: BasseDingFellerToulis2024 and PuelzBasseFellerToulis2022 target randomization validity; WeinsteinNevo2026 targets misspecified-network bias and robust estimation; none gives this three-procedure strict-separation frontier

soundness_flags.label: Theorem 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The assumptions impose projection/covariance equality but do not explicitly assume the design-based LLN or consistency conditions needed for plim hat_tau_IPW = plim hat_tau_RT = tau_ds.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: Delta_eta > 0 can arise solely from a covariance-operator row of A, but the conclusion asserts plim hat_tau_IPW != plim hat_tau_RT; require point-score block violation or weaken the conclusion to separation of at least one procedure object.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add a design-based consistency/LLN assumption for the ANI IPW and design-orbit linear contrasts, or restate Theorem 1 only as equality of limiting population functionals under already-established consistency.
Split Conjecture 2 into point-functional separation and covariance-only separation; gate the point-plim inequality on the first row block P_ANI - P_RT being nonzero on the realized tail.

Add a short comparator note for the 2026 misspecified-exposure partial-identification arXiv line, making clear why sharp bounds under exposure misspecification are orthogonal to the ANI/NCR/RT equivalence frontier.

Work out one nondegenerate boundary example where Delta_eta is zero, one where only covariance rows separate, and one where the point-score row separates; this would make the frontier and Conjecture 2 routing auditable.

recommended_next_step: Revise the assumptions and Conjecture 2 block to separate point-score and covariance separation, then rerun Stage -0.5.
